A.evidence: Prose faithful through ~page 4, then a catastrophic 'NSP Mask LM' infinite loop consumes most of the budget with duplicated garbage; reading order and headings destroyed, no markdown, no math rendered.

B.evidence: Clean, faithful prose through page 5 (stops at 'Fine-'); no tables in covered region. Headings are plain text (no markdown markup); math rendered as plain unicode (C in R^H). Handles footnotes/captions.

C.evidence: Clean markdown with ## headers through Section 3.2; faithful prose but interrupted by stray Figure-1 box OCR tokens (C, E/CLST, TN, (SEP]) and a lone 'T,'. Plain unicode math.

D.evidence: Clean markdown through Section 3.2; faithful with minor typos ('Dai and Lee', 'I_i' for T_i). Few artifacts, good heading structure. Plain unicode math.

E.evidence: Cleanest prose, reaches furthest (page 5 bottom, 'corresp'); proper LaTeX math ($C \in \mathbb{R}^H$), bold/italic emphasis, markdown headers, footnotes handled. No table content in covered region.

F.evidence: Clean, faithful through Section 3.2 'fine-tune all the paramete'; good LaTeX math and markdown headers with bold task labels. No tables in covered region.

G.evidence: Faithful prose through page 4; uniquely renders Figure 2 input-representation as a correct HTML table with LaTeX-subscripted embeddings ($E_{[CLS]}$), plus LaTeX math and footnote rules. Strongest structured/tabular capture.

H.evidence: Faithful content through page 4 (NSP), but heavily cluttered with inline reference-link anchors ([\(Peters et al.,](#page-10-0)) and messy footnote HTML (span/sup artifacts) that degrade readability and structure.
